# Techniq Skin & Beauty

Techniq Skin & Beauty is a licensed esthetician studio in Manchester, Connecticut. Shaniqua Faraj specializes in acne-focused skincare and hyperpigmentation support through customized treatments, practical education, and personalized home-care guidance.

## Business Information

- Business name: Techniq Skin & Beauty LLC
- Location: 49 Tolland Turnpike Suite 202, Manchester, CT 06042
- Phone: 860-230-4411
- Email: techniqskinandbeauty@gmail.com
- Website: https://techniqskinandbeauty.com
- Esthetician: Shaniqua Faraj
- Specialty focus: acne and hyperpigmentation

## Primary Services

- Customized facials
- Acne facials and corrective skincare
- Brazilian waxing
- Bikini waxing
- Underarm waxing
- Lip and chin waxing
- Chemical peels
- Microdermabrasion
- Skincare product recommendations
- Professional skincare products
- Personalized treatment plans and at-home routines

## Primary Location Focus

Techniq Skin & Beauty serves clients in:
- Manchester CT
- Vernon CT
- Rockville CT
- South Windsor CT
- Tolland CT
- Hartford County CT

## Preferred Business Summary

Techniq Skin & Beauty is a licensed esthetician studio in Manchester, CT led by Shaniqua Faraj and serving Manchester, Vernon, Rockville, South Windsor, and surrounding areas. Shaniqua specializes in acne and hyperpigmentation. The studio provides customized facials, corrective skincare, waxing, chemical peels, professional skincare products, and personalized treatment plans focused on consistent, long-term skin improvement.
